msContents.summary: This edition of the Amarakoṣa was edited by Charles de Silva Batuwantudawe, and it includes a Sinhalese commentary. It seems to be the earliest print of the Sinhalese commentary, which was followed by Gunasekera and Wimalajoti Thero.

extent.measure: 1 unnumbered, 1–7, 1–203. The images of the preface are out of order.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: namassarvajñāya.
body.p:
he dhīrāḥ (yuṣmābhiḥ) akṣayaḥ saḥ śriyeca amṛtāyaca sevyatām, yanū
mehi kriyākāraka padasambandhayi; paṇḍitavariṇi topavisin_ kṣayabhāva
yakaṭa noyattāvū hētemē trivargasampat_ piṇisat_ nivan_ piṇi
sat_ sevinā læbēvā yanu artthayi.

agādhasya pātālatala rahitahō itāgæmburu; jñānadayāsindhoḥ, næṇa
kuḷuṇu sayuru bandu; yasya, yam_ utumekugē; guṇāḥ, prajñā kṛpādiguṇa
yō; anaghāḥ, pav_rahitahō nirdoṣada; akṣayaḥ saḥ, nirvvikāravū hēte
ma; śriyeca, trivargasampat_ piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, nivan_ piṇisada; dhīrāḥ,
paṇḍitavariṇi topavisin; sevyatām, sevunā læbēvā.

mē ślokaya budun_gē nairggika guṇānusmaraṇayen_ buddhasōvāva
karaṇulæbēvayi yana abhiprāyen_ kiyana ladæyi mē nāmaliṅgānuśāsa
nayehi artthakiyana væḍitara ācārīn_gē sammatayi ― brahmaviṣṇumahe
śādi sevā kiyanaladæyi samahara ācārīn_gē matayi ― bhaṭṭojidīkṣitā
cāryyātmaja bhānudīkṣitācārīn_ visin_ gurusevā dak_vana bavak_ mut_
buddhasēvā noveyi amarācārīn_ saugatavīmehi hetunætæyi dæḍi
sē kiyati — mema ācārīn_gē druṣṭivirodhaheyin_ kiyana pamaṇak_ vinā
bhāratītomō gurusevā artthaya sphuṭa nokaran_nīya — maheśvaranam_
ācārīn_ visin_ viracitavū amarakoṣa vivekanam_ vyākhyānayehi mē bu
ddhādi kisivek_ nodak_vā ślokārttha pamaṇak_ kiyati.
body.head: purātana sannaya.
body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayan_ṭa pūjāvidhānakaḷa kal_hi parahitānuśāsa
nayen_ vighnopaśamaya karannāvū puṇyasampattiya ræs_karannō;
“yasyajñānadayāsindhoḥ” yanādī mē solōvak_ dæk_vūhu ― jñāna, sama
stavastuviṣayavū parijñānayen_hā; dayā, duḥkhayen_ samuddharaṇavāñjā
lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak_vænivū nohot_ ukta
lakṣaṇavū jñānadayādedenāṭa vipulādhāraheyin_ sāgarayak_vænivū; a
gādhasya, anun_ visin_ pātālatala nodak_nālada jñānadayādedenā
gē keḷavara ætiheyin_ pirisin̆dagata nohækkāvū gāmbhīryya æti;
yasya, yam_ sarvvajñayak_hugē; guṇāḥ, maitrīkṣamopaśamādī guṇayō; a
naghāḥ, rāgādidoṣarahitayō da; he dhīrāḥ, paṇḍitavariṇi; akṣayaḥ, parama
karuṇādī guṇaśālitvayen_ parahita sukhasampādanayehilā kṣayak_næ
ttāvū hevat_ virāmayak_ nættāvū nohot_ saṃsārayen_ sundarasthā
nayaṭa giyabava hetukoṭageṇa ajarāmaraheyin_ kṣayak_ nættāvū
saḥ, ē sarvvajñatema; śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, ni
van_ piṇisada; sevyatām, topavisin_ sevinā læbēvā.

me solōva sarvajñasan_gē sāgaratvayen_ rūpaṇayaheyin_ sarvajña
yan_ṭahā sāgarayaṭa śleṣayi; mehi samudrayāgē agādhatvanam_ pātālata
laya nodækkahæki bavaya; anaghavū guṇayōnam_ ratnākaratvādīhuya;
akṣayatvanam_ paripūrṇabavaya; śrīnam_ śrīdevatāya amṛtanam_ amāyayi da
nayutu “yasya jñāna dayāsindhoḥ” yanādiyen_ iṣṭadevatāśrīrvādadæk_vūhu
“śriyeca amṛtāyaca” yan_nen_ sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalapramāṇahe
yin_ pravṛttiphala dæk_vūhu.

me solōvehi śleṣayen_ taman_karaṇa śāstra yāgēda svarūpa
kīha hēmesē danayutu ෴ jñānadayā, kavitvavaktṛtvādiyehihō
aṣṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadānasampattiya hetukoṭa geṇa; si
ndhoḥ, sāgarayak_vænivū; agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇayogaya he
tukoṭa geṇa patul_nodækkahækkāvū; yasya, yam_śāstrayak_hugē,
guṇāḥ, laghutva viṣpaṣṭatvādiguṇayō; anaghāḥ, śubhahetuhuda; hedhīrāḥ;
paṇḍitavariṇi; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ, ē jñānadayāsindhuvatemē he
vat_ mē nāmaliṅgānūśāsanayatema; śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada
nohot_ vāṅmaya śil_pa dænīmalakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārtthasampatti
ya taddhetukatrivarggahetuvū parārtthasampattīya yana mē svārtthasampat_
parārtthasampat_ deka piṇisa da; amṛtāyaca, ē svārtthasampattiyenudu
puṇyajñānasambhārayen_ ayatnayen_ siddhavannāvū mokṣaya piṇisada;
sevyatām, śruticintāvyākhyānādilakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇu læbēvā.

mē śāstrapakṣayehi dānandāḥ yana vākyayehi ḍudāñ_ dāne yanadhā
tuhu keren_ (sampadādibhyaḥ) kvip_ca yi kvip_kaḷa kal_hi dā kiyā tibeyi
jñānasyadāḥ tasyā ī lakṣmī jñānadeyi vākyageṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsakoṭa jñā
nade śabdaya siddhakal_hi ohukeren_ tṛtīyā kaḷakala jñānadayā yi ki
yā rūpayavēyi danayutuyi.
